quizzes_description: Take a quiz to get access to the server.
quiz_completed_desc: Your submission has been recorded. You will be notified of the result.
profile_synced_success: Your profile has been successfully updated!
no_applications_submitted: You haven't submitted any applications yet.
unlink_confirm: Are you sure you want to unlink your MTA account?
mta_not_linked_desc: Link your in-game account to view your stats and characters here.
no_admin_records: No admin records found for this account.

link_account.title: Link MTA Account
link_account.description: Link your MTA:SA game account with your Discord and website profile
link_account.subtitle: Connect your MTA account with Discord
link_account.already_linked_subtitle: Your profile is currently linked to the following game account:
link_account.success_subtitle: You can now return to the game and press the refresh button to see your info.
link_account.step_3: Press the "Generate Code" button and copy it.
link_account.step_4: Paste the code in the field below and press "Link Account".
link_account.feature_1_desc: Your account is linked to your device's Serial to ensure it cannot be stolen.
link_account.feature_2_desc: Once linked, your information will appear in-game and on the website instantly.
link_account.link_error: An error occurred while trying to link the account

missing_env_desc: The application is missing essential Supabase credentials. Please follow the steps below to connect to your database.
db_conn_error_desc: The application could not connect to the database to load essential settings. This usually means the database schema has not been set up yet.
fix_step_1: In your Supabase project, go to Project Settings > API.
fix_step_2: In the root of this project, find the file named .env.example.
fix_step_3: Create a copy of this file and rename it to .env.
fix_step_4: Paste your Project URL and anon public API Key into the .env file.
fix_step_5: Restart the development server to apply the changes.
banned_page_message: Unfortunately, your account has been banned from accessing the website and the server.
ban_expired_msg: Your ban has expired. Please log out and log back in.
store_empty_desc: Please check back later for new items!
store_subtitle: Elevate your experience with exclusive features
store_seo_desc: Browse and buy exclusive VIP packages, in-game currency, and custom items for {{communityName}} server.
question: Question
application_submitted_desc: Thank you for applying! Our staff team will review your submission and get back to you soon.
draft_restored_msg: Your previous progress has been successfully restored.
draft_restore_notice: Your draft was restored! You will continue from question {{count}}.
answer_placeholder: Write your answer here in detail...
maintenance_desc: Welcome to {{communityName}}. We are currently performing some updates and improvements to provide you with a better and smoother experience. We'll be back very soon!
staff_only_access: Access will be granted to admins only
rules_subtitle: Staying familiar with our rules ensures a fair experience for everyone
no_rules_yet: No rules have been added yet.
rules_seo_desc: Official server rules and community guidelines for {{communityName}}.
need_help_desc: Facing an issue? Our support team is always available on Discord.
unban_confirm: Are you sure you want to unban this player?
no_characters: No characters found for this account.
